title: Foundation Models for Computational Pathology
subtitle: Featured thesis project
description: Benchmarking and evaluation pipeline for histopathology foundation models, combining whole-slide image representations and pathology report embeddings for cross-modal retrieval tasks.
details: Thesis project built around a histopathology retrieval pipeline, with reporting code, privacy-safe documentation and a compact global dashboard summarizing the final comparison.

title: VoxelMorph for Breast MRI Registration
subtitle: Public bachelor thesis project
description: Bachelor-thesis project on multimodal breast MRI registration based on VoxelMorph.
details: Work focused on adapting VoxelMorph to breast MRI registration, supported by a full preprocessing workflow and a final evaluation stage based on image-similarity and overlap metrics.

title: Machine Learning for Classification and Regression
subtitle: Coursework portfolio
description: Supervised-learning coursework focused on classification, regression and evaluation workflows.
details: R Markdown material and supporting scripts covering binary classification, cross-validation, ROC analysis, regression modelling and structural interpretation through PCA-based support views.

gallery.alt: Joint PCA view used to support the regression analysis
Observed versus predicted price for the final regression model

title: Time Series Forecasting and ARIMA Modelling
subtitle: Forecasting coursework
description: Forecasting project covering smoothing models, Box-Jenkins logic and ARIMA-based short-horizon prediction.
details: R Markdown and script workflow built around a monthly wind-generation series, with a strong emphasis on reproducibility, holdout evaluation and interpretable classical forecasting methods.

title: Neural Networks and Simulation
subtitle: Deep-learning coursework
description: Neural-networks coursework project centered on representative training and classification outputs.
details: The repository focuses on training dynamics and final classification outputs, while leaving out the original dataset references and checkpoint-heavy local workspace.

title: Multivariate Analysis and Process Monitoring
subtitle: Exploratory analysis + PLS-DA monitoring
description: Repository combining exploratory multivariate analysis with a clearly separated PLS-DA process-monitoring block.
details: The material keeps broader multivariate-analysis work apart from the later monitoring-and-diagnostics block, with the second branch explicitly centered on PLS-DA outputs and diagnostic figures.

title: Production Planning and Parallel Machine Scheduling
subtitle: Operations research project
description: Scheduling project built around unrelated parallel machines, release dates, setup times, precedence constraints and shared-resource limits.
details: The repository includes safe CSV instance files, benchmark-extension documentation, cleaned Python scripts and solver-result summaries, without publishing the original Excel workbooks.

title: Python Data Analysis Foundations
subtitle: Python rewrite of first-semester coursework
description: Compact repository on data cleaning, transformation, imputation and statistical testing, organized in Python around the coursework workflow.
details: The repository combines the sleep-study exercises with Toyota-based examples for transformations, exploratory plots and group comparisons.

title: AWS Multimodal Feedback Pipeline
subtitle: Generative AI engineering coursework
description: End-to-end AWS pipeline for validating, enriching and formatting multimodal customer-feedback data for foundation-model analysis.
details: Implementation blueprint covering Glue Data Quality, Lambda-based validation, Comprehend, Textract, Transcribe, SageMaker Processing and Bedrock-ready formatting for Claude-style downstream analysis.
